corrections.note: Printed accent appears on final syllable as Μιθραδάτῃ; if transcription already matches, ignore. Main issue on this line is elsewhere.
Second name begins Βαα-, not Βααλ-.
Printed text reads ἔγραψεν, not ἔκρινεν.
Apparatus printed variant appears Βααταμ, without lambda.

uncertain.note: Name after Ἀραρθαθὰ may need checking against scan; print is small and could affect one or more letters/accents.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct, but there are clear errors in IV 8–9. Apparatus largely correct; one name-form in IV 8 variant may be miscopied. Page number 167 at foot is present in scan but omitted from transcription format, which is acceptable.
